name: mary-workflow
description: Cycle-aware workflows with validated paper reading, grounded summaries, and offline research-presentation assets for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Mary Workflow packages a stable v2.1 milestone engine plus v2.2 research skills for independent paper states, arXiv HTML/PDF acquisition, parse-quality gating, contract-validated close reading, source-locator indexing, readable paper articles with separate grounded claim ledgers, an offline ShanghaiTech red Marp theme supply, project execution, review, recovery, and cycle archives.
